subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who turned unto God when he came with a book wherein were set forth the Books of God, the All-Subduing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الله اذ اتی بکتاب فیه فصلت کتب الله المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @exhortations and counsels, @transcendence; unknowability of God
